subcodes.first_line: A luminous leaf that was adorned with the ornament of divine love, from whose sublime and exalted words the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقه نورانیه که بطراز محبت رحمانیه مزین گشته بود و از کلمات علیه عالیه آن عرف
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @high station of the true believer
